severity_levels.critical: Large production/revenue impact, safety risk, compliance risk, or full-site outage.
severity_levels.high: Material underperformance, recurring equipment issue, major data outage, or SLA risk.
severity_levels.medium: Moderate loss, partial derate, localized equipment issue, or trend needing review.
severity_levels.low: Minor issue, informational alert, or early warning with limited impact.

site_outage.description: Site producing zero or near-zero during expected daylight operation.
site_outage.secondary_owner: Utility or DAS/SCADA Provider depending on evidence

inverter_offline_or_derated.description: One or more inverters offline, faulted, derated, or not following expected output.

tracker_fault_or_stow.description: Tracker angle abnormal, tracker controller fault, wind stow, or rows stuck.

das_or_communications.description: Data stale, missing, flatlined, or inconsistent across devices.

metering_or_scaling.description: Revenue meter and SCADA mismatch, impossible energy values, sign inversion, or unit scaling issue.

utility_outage_or_grid_event.description: POI breaker/recloser open, utility outage, voltage/frequency event, grid curtailment, or feeder issue.

curtailment.description: Intentional reduction due to utility, ISO, interconnection, PPA, or site control instruction.

soiling_or_vegetation.description: Clear-day underperformance not explained by equipment status, often gradual or seasonal.

weather_sensor_or_expected_model.description: Expected production baseline appears stale, irradiance sensor bad, weather feed missing, or model assumptions wrong.

warranty_or_epc_defect.description: Recurring equipment/design issue potentially covered by warranty or EPC obligation.

commercial_contractual.description: PPA, REC, landowner, tax, insurance, reporting, or compliance issue.
